hero.subtitle: Discover premium dental tourism with TrustDent — where international medical expertise meets a seamless, transparent experience. The journey to your healthy smile starts here.

treatments.description: Explore our bio-architectural treatments through our interactive constellation.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.description: Permanent solution for missing teeth with bio-compatible titanium.

veneers.title: Porcelain Veneers
veneers.description: Ultra-thin ceramic shells for a flawless, natural-looking smile.

zirconia.title: Zirconia Crowns
zirconia.description: High-durability aesthetic crowns that mimic natural tooth translucency.

whitening.title: Teeth Whitening
whitening.description: Professional laser whitening for immediate, radiant results.

orthodontics.title: Orthodontics
orthodontics.description: Invisalign and clear aligner systems for discreet teeth straightening.

root-canal.title: Root Canal
root-canal.description: Painless precision endodontic therapy to save your natural teeth.

full-mouth.title: Full Mouth Restoration
full-mouth.description: Complete functional and aesthetic overhaul of your entire smile.

howItWorks.description: From the moment you land to your final reveal, every second is choreographed precision.

step1.title: The Arrival
step1.desc: Luxury private transfer from airport to your 5-star sanctuary.

step2.title: Precision Analysis
step2.desc: Advanced 3D imaging and blueprinting of your restorative plan.

step3.title: Luxury Recovery
step3.desc: Enjoy the Bosphorus view while our master ceramists craft your smile.

step4.title: The Reveal
step4.desc: A new architectural masterpiece. Return home with confidence.

about.title: Built on Trust
about.longText: TrustDent turns dental tourism into a fully managed experience rather than a simple booking tool. We bring clinic selection, treatment planning, scheduling, communication, and follow‑up into one clear journey—so patients can decide confidently and avoid uncertainty. Our goal is to make trusted clinics visible, keep every step transparent, and ensure you feel supported from first contact to aftercare.
about.lead: TrustDent turns dental tourism into a safe, premium, end-to-end experience with a curated clinic network, transparent scheduling, and VIP support.
about.bottomText: Trust isn’t a claim—it’s a standard you can feel at every step. At TrustDent, design is part of the process: it guides quietly, clarifies decisions, and makes confidence tangible.

features.curatedText: We bring verified, international-standard clinics together in one place.
features.transparentText: Clear steps and guidance across treatment selection, timing, and appointment flow.
features.supportText: Single point of contact and fast responses from booking to follow-up.
features.securityText: We keep privacy and data protection in focus across registration, communication, and scheduling.
features.matchingText: We simplify choosing the right clinic and specialist based on your treatment goals.
features.aftercareText: The process doesn’t end at booking—follow‑ups, reminders, and support stay available.

review1.text: I saved over £8,000 compared to UK prices and got world-class treatment. The clinic was spotless, staff spoke perfect English, and results are amazing.

review2.text: Very satisfied with my dental treatment in Turkey. Prices are very affordable compared to Germany and the quality is the same. Found the right clinic thanks to TrustDent.

review3.text: The team was professional and made me feel comfortable throughout the process. My smile transformation is incredible. Highly recommend TrustDent.

review4.text: Booked my clear aligner treatment through TrustDent. The platform is very useful, doctor recommendations are truly reliable. Definitely recommend.

review5.text: Scheduling was fast and every step was explained clearly. The whitening result looks natural and noticeably brighter. Communication and follow-up were excellent.

review6.text: I was unsure which clinic to choose; TrustDent made it easy to decide with confidence. The plan was clear, the team was attentive, and I’m very happy with the result.
